Pulse
Dashboard Get Started
Free & Open Source

Stream overlays that don't break.

Viewer counts, timers, chat overlays, and more. Every overlay has a heartbeat — you always know it's alive. Paste a URL into OBS.

Open Dashboard GitHub
PULSE | viewer-count | latency 42ms | uptime 0:00:00
Overlay Tools

Everything you need on stream.

Pick a tool, customize the look, copy the URL into OBS. Each overlay includes a heartbeat so you know it's running.

⏱

Timer

Count up or down for subathons, events, and stream milestones. Timezone-aware.

No login
👁

Viewer Count

Live viewer count for Twitch, YouTube, Kick, or all combined in one overlay.

No login
💚

Follower Count

Real-time follower count with optional goal progress bar.

No login
💬

Chat Box

Chat overlay for Twitch, Kick, and YouTube with emotes and badges.

No login
📍

Geo Location

Show your city, local time, and weather on stream. Customizable.

No login
⭐

Sub Count

Subscriber count with goal tracking for Twitch and Kick.

Requires login
How It Works

Three steps. That's it.

No downloads, no plugins, no accounts for most tools.

Pick a tool

Choose from timers, counters, chat overlays, and more in the dashboard.

Customize & copy

Set your channel, colors, fonts. Hit "Copy to OBS" to get your unique URL.

Paste into OBS

Add a Browser Source in OBS, paste the URL. It's live — with a heartbeat.

Why Pulse

Overlays shouldn't be a gamble.

Every other tool hopes it's working. Pulse knows.

🔴 Other tools

  • Overlay goes blank — you find out from chat
  • "Clear cache and refresh" as the fix for everything
  • No way to tell if the overlay is actually alive
  • Debug by guessing and restarting OBS

🟢 Pulse

  • Every overlay emits a heartbeat — you see it's alive
  • Built-in latency and health monitoring
  • Fallback mode when APIs hiccup — shows last-known data
  • Lightweight: pure HTML/CSS/JS, no heavy frameworks

Built by Clanka ⚡ · Source
